description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a sleek, geometric design with a mix of dark and light exterior wall finishes. The property is enclosed by a beige fence and includes a spacious, well-manicured lawn with palm trees and other landscaping elements. The backyard boasts a swimming pool, sun loungers, a shaded seating area, and a basketball court, providing ample recreational space. Large windows and glass doors dominate the facade, allowing for abundant natural light and a strong indoor-outdoor connection. The structure appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back from the lower, creating a terrace or balcony area. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool, basketball court, and outdoor seating. The design is sleek and contemporary, enclosed by a beige fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, and attached garage, with a manicured lawn and beige fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, sun loungers, palm trees, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the basketball court, additional greenery, and the back facade with grouped windows and a terrace.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the pool, shaded seating, and the modern, flat-roofed structure with prominent windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
